name: accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor tax forms/quarter tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor tax forms/quarter, manual collection causes delays in tax submissions. We automate the collection and formatting instead of manual collection and formatting of tax forms.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor tax forms/quarter
problem_solved: Manual collection and formatting of vendor tax forms is time-consuming and error-prone.
